scope: Add a dedicated CLI command for regenerating the repo-local MiroFish watchtower surface

decision_context.prior_state: The watchtower surface and snapshot existed, but refreshing them still required a manual watchtower packet plus extra setup.
decision_context.decision: Add a `mirofish-watchtower-snapshot` command that writes a repo-local snapshot directly and records the emitted page list.
decision_context.why_now: This turns the MiroFish dashboard surface into a reusable repo-local workflow instead of a one-off manual sequence.

files_expected.purpose: Adds the dedicated MiroFish watchtower snapshot command.
Records the generated page list for the latest watchtower refresh.
Documents the new refresh command and why it exists.

planned_steps: Add a dedicated snapshot command to the repo CLI
Use that command to generate a latest watchtower surface under research/meta
Verify the command with the focused watchtower and portfolio regression slice

expected_checks: The emitted result packet includes MiroFish Portfolio.md
The generated latest surface stays inside research/meta

guardrails: Do not reimplement watchtower page generation logic inside the new command
Keep the generated latest surface inside research/meta
Treat the latest snapshot as a refreshable surface over the canonical checkpoint
